chunks.text: THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D- 1414 of 2023 (Mst. Inayata Narejo v. SHO, P.S, Agra & others) 22-05-2024 Mr. Khan Muhammad Sangi, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Nazir Ahmed Junejo, Advocate for respondent No.3. M/s Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional P.G and Agha Athar Pathan, Assistant A.G a/w Inspector Maqsood Rasool Mahar, SHO, P.S, Agra. ***** In terms of last order, SHO, P.S, Agra has filed report. He has confirmed that petitioner has been divorced by her previous husband namely Mir Muhammad before she contracted second marriage and in this regard she was able to produce four witnesses before whom divorce between the parties had taken place. Since it has been confirmed that petitioner has contracted second marriage with her current husband namely Ahmed Ali alias Anboo on her freewill and was not abducted by him, FIR No.26 of 2023 registered at P.S, Agra under sections 365-B, 363, 147, 148 & 149 PPC is hereby quashed and the petition is accordingly disposed of along with pending application(s). J U D G E J U D G E Ahmad
